title: paeonia tenuifolia f. latifolia
intro: Paeonia tenuifolia f. latifolia is a variety of the peony plant, characterized by its broad leaves and pale yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe pain and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Paeonia tenuifolia f. latifolia include its potential to ease menstrual cramps, improve sleep quality, and reduce stress levels. It is commonly prepared as a tincture or tea, and can also be used in topical creams and salves to take advantage of its anti-inflammatory properties.
